zh.Königsfelden, Windisch, Aargau, Switzerl: 瑞士阿高文迪可特格斯費爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Herzogin von Österreich於1280年出生時，她的父親Albrecht II von Habsburg25歲，母親Elisabeth of Carinthia17歲。她於1295年與Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年3月19日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Herzogin von Österreich于1280年出生时，她的父亲Albrecht II von Habsburg25岁，母亲Elisabeth of Carinthia17岁。她于1295年与Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年3月19日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Österreich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Kurt, Uwe, Wolfgang.

German (rarely Österreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of Upper or Lower Austria, from German Österreich ‘Austria’, the name of which literally means ‘Eastern kingdom’.

variants.name: Oestreicher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Franz, Otto, Horst.  Jewish Shloime, Chaim, Mendy.
German (also Östreicher) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the province of Upper or Lower Austria (see Oesterreich ).

variants.name: Oestreich
meanings: German (also Östreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Oesterreich .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Herzogin von Österreich was born in 1280, her father, Albrecht II von Habsburg, was 25 and her mother, Elisabeth of Carinthia, was 17. She married Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg in 1295. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 19 March 1327, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Herzogin von Österreich est née en 1280, son père, Albrecht II von Habsburg, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth of Carinthia, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg en 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mars 1327, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Herzogin von Österreich 1280 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht II von Habsburg 25 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth of Carinthia 17. Sie hat 1295 Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. März 1327 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Herzogin von Österreich è nata il nel 1280, sua padre, Albrecht II von Habsburg, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth of Carinthia, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg nel 1295. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 marzo 1327, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Herzogin von Österreichが1280年に生まれた時，父Albrecht II von Habsburgは25歳，母Elisabeth of Carinthiaは17歳であった。1295年にHermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年3月19日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Herzogin von Österreich(이)가 1280년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht II von Habsburg(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth of Carinthia(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1295년 Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 3월 19일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Herzogin von Österreich nasceu em 1280, seu pai, Albrecht II von Habsburg, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth of Carinthia, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg em 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de março de 1327, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Herzogin von Österreich родилась в 1280 г., её отцу по имени Albrecht II von Habsburg было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth of Carinthia, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg в 1295 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 19 марта 1327 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.from 1285 to 1307: mai le 1285 e o'o I le 1307

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Herzogin von Österreich nació en 1280, su papá, Albrecht II von Habsburg, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth of Carinthia, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg en 1295. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1327, a la edad de 47 años.
